modId.label: Please enter your mod/plugin id
modId.description: You must past 𝗼𝗻𝗹𝘆 the id and not the entire link

modLoaders.placeholder: Select at least one mod/plugin loader
modLoaders.label: Mod/plugin loaders
modLoaders.description: You will be mentioned only for these loaders.
modLoaders.quilt: A fork of Fabric but community-driven. Recommanded.
modLoaders.forge: The most popular and one of the oldests. Recommanded.
modLoaders.neoforge: A fork of Forge's project community-driven. Recommanded.
modLoaders.papermc: The first way to create plugins for servers by using PaperMC. Recommanded.
modLoaders.purpur: A faster way to launch plugins for servers which need optimization. Recommanded.
modLoaders.spigot: Another way to create plugins for servers. Recommanded.
modLoaders.folia: A fork of PaperMC's project to improve large server's performances. Recommanded.
modLoaders.bukkit: The father of Spigot, which is now obsolete.
